---
title: "test_strategists_bonus.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\contracts\test_strategists_bonus.py"
loc: 85
complexity: 2
logic_score: 3.52
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 5.16
overall_score: 3.27
---

## Intent
The `test_strategists_bonus.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestValkyrieWarden, test_finds_unused_function, test_filters_low_confidence, TestMimirWarden, test_finds_complex_function, test_valkyrie_precedes_beauty. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestValkyrieWarden, test_finds_unused_function, test_filters_low_confidence, TestMimirWarden, test_finds_complex_function, test_valkyrie_precedes_beauty. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 24 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.mimir](file://src.sentinel.wardens.mimir)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.valkyrie](file://src.sentinel.wardens.valkyrie)

### Exports
- `TestValkyrieWarden`
- `test_finds_unused_function`
- `test_filters_low_confidence`
- `TestMimirWarden`
- `test_finds_complex_function`
- `test_valkyrie_precedes_beauty`
